seoTitle: How to Build a Daily and Weekly Planner in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to set up a daily and weekly planner in ClickUp using custom fields, calendar views, and recurring tasks to organize your schedule.
intro: Keeping track of daily priorities and weekly goals in one place gets easier when your task manager can double as a planner. This guide walks through building a dedicated planner list in ClickUp, adding custom fields for priority and time estimates, and setting up recurring tasks for routines that repeat every day or week. By the end you'll have a structure you can view as a calendar, board, or list depending on how you like to plan.

steps.heading: Set up a dedicated planner list
steps.body: Create a new list in your workspace specifically for daily and weekly planning, separate from your other project lists.

steps.heading: Add custom fields for priority and time
steps.body: Build custom fields to track priority tiers, estimated time for each task, and categories like work versus personal so you can filter your day at a glance.

steps.heading: Switch to Calendar view for your weekly agenda
steps.body: Use ClickUp's Calendar view to lay out your week and see how tasks are distributed across days before you commit to a schedule.

steps.heading: Set up recurring tasks for routines
steps.body: Configure recurrence rules on tasks that repeat daily or weekly, like a morning check-in or a weekly review, so you don't have to recreate them manually.

steps.heading: Use Board view to prioritize your day
steps.body: Switch to a Kanban-style board to drag and drop tasks between open, in-progress, and completed columns as you work through your list.

faq.question: Can I use the same planner for both personal and work tasks?
faq.answer: Yes, adding a custom field for category lets you tag tasks as personal or work related and filter your view based on what you're focused on.

faq.question: Will recurring tasks automatically reappear each week?
faq.answer: Yes, once you set up recurrence rules on a task, ClickUp automatically regenerates it based on the schedule you define.

faq.question: Do I need a paid ClickUp plan for a planner like this?
faq.answer: Core features like custom fields, calendar view, and recurring tasks are available on ClickUp's free plan, though usage limits vary by tier.

faq.question: Can ClickUp help summarize my week automatically?
faq.answer: ClickUp Brain can be used to generate a summary of your upcoming agenda and highlight stale tasks that need attention.
